title: elaphoglossum sartorii
intro: Elaphoglossum sartorii is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Elaphoglossum sartorii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies, such as salves and ointments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
